name: Biller Genie
description: Biller Genie — US accounts receivable automation platform with auto-posting, digital invoicing, and payment reminders for SMBs.

seo.title: Biller Genie — Invoicing / Taxes / Sales Tax
seo.meta_description: Biller Genie: Biller Genie — US accounts receivable automation platform with auto-posting, digital invoicing, and payment reminders for SMBs.

when_to_use: Automated AR follow-up and payment reminders for US SMBs
Digital invoice delivery with embedded pay-now link for QuickBooks users
Auto-posting payments to accounting systems with reconciliation
Reducing days sales outstanding for service businesses

cons: No real public API for custom workflows
Customer portal UI is functional but plain
Reporting depth lags enterprise AR tools
review.verdict: Pragmatic AR automation for US SMBs glued to QuickBooks — fast ROI but thin for complex needs.
review.best_for: US small businesses using QuickBooks/Xero that want set-and-forget collections.
review.not_for: Global B2B teams needing multi-entity, multi-currency AR and deep API access.
